text: Welcome to Boston University! Forward Jack Harrington (F, 2027) has committed to BU for next season. Big pickup for the Terriers. 🐕
Transfer news: Defenseman Milo Novak is transferring from Omaha to Denver for 2026-27.
Goalie Anders Lindqvist has entered the portal and is leaving Minnesota Duluth. Destination TBD.
Big weekend for the program — hyped for what's ahead. More news soon. Details: https://www.eliteprospects.com/some-article
